overall.description: End credits sequence from Warhammer 40,000: Space Marine 2, featuring a slideshow of high-quality concept art illustrations. The video cycles through various gothic sci-fi environments including dark city streets, ice caves, alien landscapes, and industrial complexes, alongside character portraits of Space Marines and Tyranid aliens. Static camera with crossfade transitions between images, with white and gold scrolling text credits displayed on the right side of the screen.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark, ruined gothic street, transitioning via crossfade to a crystalline ice cave at 3 seconds, then to an alien landscape with a towering purple spire at 6 seconds. The camera remains static throughout, displaying high-quality concept art with scrolling credits on the right side of the screen.

segments.scene_description: This segment features character-focused concept art, starting with a Space Marine librarian in ornate armor, transitioning to an intense battle scene against a massive alien creature at 12 seconds, and ending with a close-up character portrait at 15 seconds. The scrolling credits continue on the right.

segments.scene_description: The segment displays antagonist imagery, beginning with a menacing skull helmet with red glowing eyes, transitioning to a scarred character portrait at 21 seconds, and revealing a massive Tyranid creature at 24 seconds. The dark, moody lighting emphasizes the threatening nature of these characters.

segments.scene_description: This segment transitions through environmental concept art, starting with overgrown jungle ruins featuring ancient stone structures, moving to a sprawling industrial cityscape at 30 seconds, and descending into a claustrophobic machinery interior at 33 seconds. The progression moves from natural to heavily industrialized spaces.

segments.scene_description: The segment showcases architectural variety, beginning with a sleek high-tech interior featuring circular structures, transitioning to a harsh desert industrial zone at 39 seconds, and concluding with a majestic gothic bridge leading to a spired city at 42 seconds. Each environment displays distinct architectural styles from futuristic to ancient gothic.

segments.scene_description: The final segment displays industrial and destructive imagery, starting with a dockside crane scene, transitioning to a majestic gothic cathedral at 48 seconds, and ending with an intense scene of a burning building at 51 seconds. The sequence concludes the first loop of the credits before returning to the opening street scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous progression of concept art that shifts from desolate gothic ruins and alien vistas into a series of character portraits before concluding with sprawling industrial and architectural landscapes. It begins in a dark, ruined gothic street, gliding through a crystalline ice cave and an alien landscape dominated by a towering purple spire. The scene then shifts toward character-focused imagery, moving from an ornate Space Marine librarian and intense battle scenes to menacing portraits of skull-helmeted antagonists and massive Tyranid creatures. As the focus returns to the environment, the camera travels from overgrown jungle ruins into a sprawling industrial cityscape and claustrophobic machinery interiors. Finally, the journey passes through sleek high-tech halls and harsh desert zones, moving across a majestic gothic bridge and a cathedral before ending on the sight of a burning building.
